sellers_note: LUXURIOUS, ELECTRIFYING, SOPHISTICATED, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, OFF-LEASE, NONSMOKER, STUNNING! The 2023 Lexus RZ 450e Luxury AWD represents a bold new direction for premium electric SUVs, blending refined craftsmanship with cutting-edge EV engineering and unmistakable Lexus comfort. Built on a dedicated electric platform and equipped with intelligent all-wheel drive, this RZ delivers smooth acceleration, whisper-quiet performance, and a remarkably composed ride. True to the Lexus pursuit of perfection, it surrounds passengers with upscale materials, advanced technology, and the kind of serene driving experience luxury buyers expect from the brand. The RZ 450e Luxury AWD separates itself from competitors like the Tesla Model Y, Audi Q4 e-tron, and Genesis Electrified GV70 by emphasizing comfort, craftsmanship, and refinement over gimmicks or harsh sporty tuning. Lexus engineers focused heavily on ride quality, cabin isolation, and driver confidence, giving the RZ a uniquely polished personality in the premium EV space. Its DIRECT4 all-wheel-drive system also delivers intelligent torque distribution for enhanced stability and traction in varying road conditions. The automotive press reviewed this one more like a standing ovation than a critique. In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! This RZ is packed with premium technology and luxury appointments in a way that perfectly reflects the Lexus mission of crafting amazing experiences. Every drive feels carefully engineered to combine electric innovation with true first-class comfort. This particular RZ 450e Luxury AWD arrives impressively equipped with premium factory upgrades that elevate its comfort, style, convenience, and all-weather confidence even further. Dynamic Sky Panorama Glass Roof -- Creates an open, airy cabin feel with electronically dimmable panoramic glass technology. Illuminated Front Badge -- Adds a distinctive premium lighting signature to the front fascia. Mudguards -- Help protect exterior paint from road debris and slush. Activity Mount -- Adds additional utility for cargo or accessory carrying capability. Kick Sensor -- Enables convenient hands-free access to the rear liftgate area. COLD AREA PACKAGE Headlamp Washers -- Help maintain visibility in snowy or dirty weather conditions. The 2023 Lexus RZ 450e Luxury AWD delivers an EPA-estimated driving range of approximately 196 miles when equipped with its 20-inch wheels. Its dual-motor all-wheel-drive system produces a combined 308 horsepower, delivering smooth, immediate electric acceleration along with composed and confident handling. The dedicated EV platform contributes to a low center of gravity and exceptionally refined ride quality.
